name: Thessivane Aurmirith
summary: Dragon Elf Sorcerer-Duelist — The Auric Court of Vaeltharys
content:
# THE FORGE — NPC OUTPUT: DRAGON ELF

---

> *Dragon Elf Sorcerer-Duelist — The Auric Court of Vaeltharys*
**Thessivane Aurmirith**
*"She-Who-Wears-Gold" — a champion of a dying empire who has not yet been told the empire is dead.*

**System Context:** The Auric Court of Vaeltharys was once the organizing institution of Dragon Elf civilization — a hereditary meritocracy in which sorcerous bloodline determined rank, and rank determined everything: land rights, marriage contracts, guild access, the right to bear arms openly in the city. The Court collapsed two generations ago when the last Eternal Wyrm, the divine-political figurehead at its apex, simply *flew away* and did not return. What remains are its functionaries — Dragon Elves who were trained, educated, and psychologically shaped by an institution that no longer exists, still enforcing protocols no one has authorized, collecting debts no treasury can honor.

**Weight of History:** Thessivane was inducted into the Court's Duelists at age twelve, fourteen years before the Eternal Wyrm's departure, which means she has now spent more of her life serving a dissolved institution than a living one.

**Name Origin:** *Thessivane* is a Vaeltharyn compound name — *thessiv* (gilded, or "touched by the sun's belly") combined with the feminine suffix *-ane*, marking her as a firstborn daughter of a recognized bloodline; *Aurmirith* is her Court title, not her family name, meaning roughly "Gold-Mirror," a rank designation she has refused to relinquish.

---

**Appearance:** Thessivane stands six feet of lean, deliberate muscle, her posture the product of ten thousand hours of dueling footwork — weight always slightly forward, one shoulder angled back, never truly at rest. Her skin is a deep bronze-olive, and she has chosen to cultivate her draconic heritage with visible intention: fine gold scales trace her cheekbones and the backs of her hands in chevron patterns, her eyes are vertical-pupiled amber with a faint internal luminescence, and her canines have lengthened into points she does not bother to hide when she smiles. Her hair is white-gold, kept short and close, and she wears the formal duelist's coat of the Auric Court — deep crimson with gold piping — which has been mended so many times the original cloth exists mostly as memory.

**Personality:**
- **Trait:** She addresses every person she meets by their institutional title or function first, their name second — and if she does not know either, she will ask, formally, before the conversation proceeds. This is not rudeness; it is the only social grammar she was ever taught.
- **Bond:** She is collecting the Court's outstanding debts — favors owed, oaths sworn, contracts signed — from families and factions across the region, not for money, but because *someone has to maintain the record*, and she has decided that someone is her.
- **Flaw:** She cannot recognize the dissolution of legitimate authority as a permanent condition. Every collapsed institution, to her, is simply between leadership transitions.

### STAT BLOCK

> *Medium Humanoid (Dragon Elf), Lawful Neutral — Challenge 14 (11,500 XP)*
**THESSIVANE AURMIRITH**
*Auric Court Duelist-Sorcerer, CR 14*

**Armor Class** 17 (Draconic Sorcerer's natural resilience + duelist's reflex) | **Hit Points** 178 (21d8 + 84) | **Speed** 35 ft.

| STR | DEX | CON | INT | WIS | CHA |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| 14 (+2) | 20 (+5) | 18 (+4) | 16 (+3) | 14 (+2) | 22 (+6) |

**Saving Throws:** Dex +10, Con +9, Cha +11
**Skills:** Acrobatics +10, History +8, Insight +7, Intimidation +11, Persuasion +11
**Damage Resistances:** Fire, Lightning
**Condition Immunities:** Frightened (while conscious)
**Senses:** Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 12
**Languages:** Draconic, Elvish, Common, Auric Court Diplomatic Cipher

---

## SPECIAL TRAITS

***Draconic Ancestry (Gold & Storm).*** Thessivane has resistance to fire and lightning damage. Her unarmed strikes and natural weapons (claws, bite) count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance.

***Fey Ancestry.*** Thessivane has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic cannot put her to sleep.

***Institutional Authority.*** Creatures that are aware of the Auric Court (or any noble/legal institution) must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw when Thessivane formally invokes her title and presents documentation or they are inclined to comply with reasonable requests as if under the effects of *suggestion* for 1 minute. Creatures immune to charm are immune to this effect.

***Court Sorcery (Spellcasting).*** Thessivane is a 14th-level sorcerer. Her spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 19, +11 to hit with spell attacks). She has 14 sorcery points.

**Spells Known:**
- **Cantrips (at will):** *fire bolt, shocking grasp, prestidigitation, mage hand, message*
- **1st (4 slots):** *shield, chromatic orb, thunderwave*
- **2nd (3 slots):** *mirror image, misty step, scorching ray*
- **3rd (3 slots):** *counterspell, lightning bolt, haste*
- **4th (3 slots):** *greater invisibility, wall of fire*
- **5th (2 slots):** *cone of cold, hold monster*
- **6th (1 slot):** *chain lightning*
- **7th (1 slot):** *finger of death*

***Duelist's Footwork.*** Thessivane does not provoke opportunity attacks when she casts a spell. Additionally, she may cast a spell and make one claw attack as part of the same action (see Multiattack).

---

## ACTIONS

***Multiattack.*** Thessivane makes two Auric Claw attacks, or she makes one Auric Claw attack and casts one sorcerer spell of 3rd level or lower.

***Auric Claw (Melee Weapon Attack).*** *+10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target.* Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) fire damage. On a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn as superheated golden light erupts from the wound.

***Breath of the Auric Court (Recharge 5–6).*** Thessivane exhales a 60-foot line of superheated golden flame. Each creature in the line must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. The flame then lingers as *difficult terrain* for 1 round.

***Formal Challenge (1/Day).*** Thessivane formally declares a duel upon one creature she can see within 60 feet, invoking Auric Court protocol. The target must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or be *compelled* to fight her one-on-one (as per the *compelled duel* spell, no concentration required) for 1 minute. Creatures that cannot understand language automatically succeed.

---

## BONUS ACTIONS

***Sorcery Point Conversion.*** Thessivane can spend sorcery points to fuel Metamagic (Quickened Spell, Twinned Spell, Subtle Spell) as normal for a sorcerer of her level.

***Misty Step (2nd-level slot).*** Thessivane teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space she can see.

---

## REACTIONS

***Counterspell (3rd-level slot or higher).*** When she sees a creature within 60 feet cast a spell, Thessivane can use her reaction to attempt to counter it (DC 10 + spell level for spells above 3rd level).

***Court Parry.*** When hit by a melee attack, Thessivane can use her reaction to add +4 to her AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. She must be able to see the attacker.

---
